posts.text: Can Donald Trump really declare victory over Iran if it can now act as toll-collector on a vital international shipping lane? https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/04/10/after-the-war-how-open-will-the-strait-of-hormuz-be?taid=69d9a67ab797b6000127325f&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: Iran is struggling to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz because it cannot locate all the sea mines it deployed and lacks the capability to remove them, per NYT.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Fractal graphene aggregates are extremely special.   I can’t wait to share our findings as to how uniquely special they are.  Prepare to be mind blown…
